zh.Little Sugnall, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾素納爾
zh.Whitmore, Staffordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾惠特莫爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Aldithley於1137年出生在英國時，她的父親Liuif de Aldithley25歲，母親Mabella Stanley24歲。她和Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1180年在英國英格蘭享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Aldithley于1137年出生在英国时，她的父亲Liuif de Aldithley25岁，母亲Mabella Stanley24岁。她和Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1180年在英国英格兰享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Aldithley was born in 1137, in England, her father, Liuif de Aldithley, was 25 and her mother, Mabella Stanley, was 24. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton. She died in 1180, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Aldithley est née en 1137, à Angleterre, son père, Liuif de Aldithley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mabella Stanley, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton. Elle est décédée en 1180, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Aldithley 1137 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Liuif de Aldithley 25 und ihre Mutter Mabella Stanley 24. Sie hatte mit Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1180 im Alter von 43 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Aldithley è nata il nel 1137 nel England, sua padre, Liuif de Aldithley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mabella Stanley, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton. Morì nel 1180, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Aldithleyが1137年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Liuif de Aldithleyは25歳，母Mabella Stanleyは24歳であった。彼女はRobert FitzAlan of Swynnertonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1180年にイギリスイギリスで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Aldithley(이)가 1137년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Liuif de Aldithley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabella Stanley(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 잉글랜드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Little Sugnall, Staffordshire, England: Sugnall, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Whitmore, Staffordshire, England, United: Whitmore, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Aldithley nasceu em 1137, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Liuif de Aldithley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mabella Stanley, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton. Ela faleceu em 1180, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Aldithley родилась в 1137 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Liuif de Aldithley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabella Stanley, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton. Она умерла в 1180 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Aldithley nació en 1137, en Inglaterra, su papá, Liuif de Aldithley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mabella Stanley, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton. Murió en 1180, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
